svg.title: LangGraph deep research agent workflow
svg.desc: A flowchart of the deep research agent graph from Korinek (2025). Five nodes: lead researcher, spawn subtasks, search agent (with a self-loop conditional), analysis agent, and synthesis agent, then END.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the lead_researcher node do in the Korinek 2025 paper?')
sendPrompt('What does spawn_subtasks do in the research agent?')
sendPrompt('How does the search_agent node work and what is its conditional loop?')
sendPrompt('What does the analysis_agent do with retrieved sources?')
sendPrompt('What does the synthesis_agent produce as output?')
